meta.title: Climbing the Corporate AI Ladder -DeepLearning.AI & FourthBrain
meta.description:
Join us at Climbing the Corporate AI Ladder, and hear our speakers share their first-hand experience on how to level up your career. This event is co-hosted by DeepLearning.AI and FourthBrain. 

Speakers:
-Gabriela de Queiroz (https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabrieladequeiroz/), Program Director of Open Source, Data, & AI Technologies, IBM
-Muazma Zahid (https://www.linkedin.com/in/muazmazahid/), Principal Engineering Manager, Microsoft
-Shivani Poddar (https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivani-poddar/), Tech Lead for Machine Learning / Artificial Intelligence, Facebook


To learn more about us and signup for future events:
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/

To learn more about FourthBrain:https://www.fourthbrain.ai/
